holdings.infoBox: EMLP is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings.

overview.description: The First Trust North American Energy Infrastructure Fund (EMLP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in North American energy infrastructure MLPs and LLCs. EMLP was launched on Jun 21, 2012 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: The Math Shows The First Trust North American Energy Infrastructure Fund ETF Can Go To $28
data.text: For the First Trust North American Energy Infrastructure Fund ETF (EMLP), we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $28.06 per unit.
